---
title: "Kate McCarthy"
image: katemccarthyJT.jpg
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/katemccarthyy
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mccarthykate
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:kate.a.mccarthy48@gmail.com
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```
